nasb.text: They conspired against him in Jerusalem, and he fled to Lachish; but they sent after him to Lachish and killed him there.

esv.text: And they made a conspiracy against him in Jerusalem, and he fled to Lachish. But they sent after him to Lachish and put him to death there.

cnv.text: 在耶路撒冷有人陰謀反叛他，他就逃到拉吉去。他們派人跟蹤他到拉吉，就在那裡把他殺死了。

ccb.text: 耶路撒冷有人谋反，亚玛谢就逃到拉吉，叛党派人追到那里杀了他。
